before.lore: A sweet tune permeates the air. A whistle on the waves; a melody from the depths. It calls forth destruction in seafoam and sand, and those who hear its call do not breathe for long.

after.lore: A sweet tune permeates the air. A whistle on the waves; a melody from the depths. It calls forth destruction in seafoam and sand, and those who hear its call do not breathe for long.

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

before.lore: Roll the dice, hit a match. You never miss.

majorIds.Juggle: Mutilate adds an additional 12 hits. All hits are reduced by -10%.

after.lore: Roll the dice, hit a match. You never miss.

before.lore: One of the first dwarven theories of the increasing quakes in east Gavel was that the freezing of a Dogun town in the Heights also froze a massive underground spring, disrupting the earth and chain-reacting across the province.

after.lore: One of the first dwarven theories of the increasing quakes in east Gavel was that the freezing of a Dogun town in the Heights also froze a massive underground spring, disrupting the earth and chain-reacting across the province.

majorIds.Bound by Blood: Shadow Projection's teleport range, duration, and launch strength is doubled.

before.lore: Two sides of the same coin.

majorIds.Bound by Blood: Shadow Projection's teleport range, duration, and launch strength is doubled.

after.lore: Two sides of the same coin.

before.lore: When the lost city of Sarnfic sunk beneath the depths, nothing but the bubbles of screams and this single wand surfaced. When used, you can still hear the town's lament.

after.lore: When the lost city of Sarnfic sunk beneath the depths, nothing but the bubbles of screams and this single wand surfaced. When used, you can still hear the town's lament.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.
Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

before.lore: One of Detlas' buildings was struck by lightning 60 years ago and burnt to the ground, apart from one wooden beam that began to glow. It was fashioned into an exclusive wand for resident mages.

after.lore: One of Detlas' buildings was struck by lightning 60 years ago and burnt to the ground, apart from one wooden beam that began to glow. It was fashioned into an exclusive wand for resident mages.

before.lore: Adherence to the laws of good is important- it's why one fights the spread of corruption, after all. Though whether to follow the spirit or the letter... perhaps they too can be bent to your will.

after.lore: Adherence to the laws of good is important- it's why one fights the spread of corruption, after all. Though whether to follow the spirit or the letter... perhaps they too can be bent to your will.

majorIds.Divine Right: Your Maximum Health is reduced by 60%. For every 100 HP lost, Sacred Surge's damage is increased by 5%.

before.lore: There is very little outside the purview of those with power. No matter the circumstance, those in a higher position can, will, and have justified their actions in different ways. Some reasons are fine, some are weak. But what sort of justification is there, for those in the highest position? You have the floor.

majorIds.Divine Right: Your Maximum Health is reduced by 60%. For every 100 HP lost, Sacred Surge's damage is increased by 5%.

after.lore: There is very little outside the purview of those with power. No matter the circumstance, those in a higher position can, will, and have justified their actions in different ways. Some reasons are fine, some are weak. But what sort of justification is there, for those in the highest position? You have the floor.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

before.lore: Under the waters, between the waves, there lies something-something beautiful.

majorIds.Gentle Glow: Orphion's Pulse restores 5% more max health per pulse, but heals at a slower rate.

after.lore: Under the waters, between the waves, there lies something-something beautiful.
